nasb.text: But he did not number Levi and Benjamin among them, for the king’s command was abhorrent to Joab.

esv.text: But he did not include Levi and Benjamin in the numbering, for the king’s command was abhorrent to Joab.

cnv.text: 唯有利未人和便雅憫人，他沒有數點在內，因為約押厭惡王這個命令。

ccb.text: 约押没有把利未人和便雅悯人算在其中，因为他厌恶王的这个命令。
